add-text-annotation-to-page-three.title: Add Text Annotation to PDF Page Three
add-text-annotation-to-page-three.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a TextAnnotation on the third page, and save the updated document.

add-highlight-with-linked-popup-annotati.title: Add Highlight with Linked Popup Annotation
add-highlight-with-linked-popup-annotati.description: Loads a PDF, adds a yellow highlight annotation on the first page, creates a popup annotation linked to the highlight, and saves the updated document.

add-free-text-annotation-arial.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Arial Font to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-arial.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a free‑text annotation using Arial 12‑point font, and save the modified document with Aspose.Pdf.

add-callout-leader-line-to-freetext-anno.title: Add Callout Leader Line to Free-Text Annotation
add-callout-leader-line-to-freetext-anno.description: Shows how to create a free‑text annotation with a callout leader line by setting the FreeTextCallout intent and specifying the Callout points.

hide-free-text-annotation-page-five.title: Hide Free-Text Annotation on a Specific PDF Page
hide-free-text-annotation-page-five.description: Shows how to add a free‑text annotation to page 5 of a PDF and make it invisible by setting the Hidden flag while keeping its data intact.

add-yellow-highlight-annotation.title: Add Yellow Highlight Annotation with Opacity
add-yellow-highlight-annotation.description: Shows how to add a highlight annotation to a PDF page, set its color to yellow and opacity to 80% using Aspose.Pdf.

set-underline-annotation-opacity-50.title: Set Underline Annotation Opacity to 50% in PDF
set-underline-annotation-opacity-50.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over underline annotations on a specified page, sets their opacity to 50%, and saves the modified document.

set-author-strikethrough-annotation.title: Set Author of Strikethrough Annotation in PDF
set-author-strikethrough-annotation.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate StrikeOutAnnotation objects, set their author via the Title property, and save the updated document.

delete-annotation-by-id-from-pdf-page.title: Delete Annotation by Id from PDF Page
delete-annotation-by-id-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to locate an annotation on the second page of a PDF using its Name (unique Id) and remove it with Aspose.Pdf, then save the modified document.

remove-annotations-from-page-3.title: Remove All Annotations from a Specific PDF Page
remove-annotations-from-page-3.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access the third page, clear all its annotations, and save the modified document.

retrieve-annotations-from-pdf-page.title: Retrieve Annotations from a Specific PDF Page
retrieve-annotations-from-pdf-page.description: Loads a PDF, accesses page four, extracts its annotation collection, and prints each annotation's type to the console.

modify-annotation-rectangle-by-id.title: Modify Annotation Rectangle by Id
modify-annotation-rectangle-by-id.description: Loads a PDF, locates an annotation using its Name (Id), updates its rectangle coordinates, and saves the modified document.

import-annotations-from-xfdf.title: Import Annotations from XFDF String into PDF
import-annotations-from-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, import annotations from an XFDF string using Aspose.Pdf, and save the updated document.

export-page-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export Annotations from a PDF Page to XFDF
export-page-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a specific PDF page and save them as an XFDF file placed next to the original PDF.

import-annotations-from-fdf.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read an FDF file containing annotations, import those annotations into the PDF, and save the updated document.

batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Text Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through each page, and add a text annotation with custom properties to every page using Aspose.Pdf.

highlight-keyword-across-pdf-pages.title: Highlight Keyword Across PDF Pages
highlight-keyword-across-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to search for a specific word in a PDF and apply highlight annotations to every occurrence on all pages using Aspose.Pdf.

add-figure-annotations-custom-line-width.title: Add Figure Annotations with Custom Line Width and Color
add-figure-annotations-custom-line-width.description: Shows how to add square figure annotations with a custom stroke color and line width to selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Batch Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Files
batch-export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF documents and export each file's annotations to a separate XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs in Parallel
import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.description: Demonstrates how to import annotation data from an XFDF file into several PDF documents simultaneously using Aspose.Pdf and Parallel.ForEach for efficient batch processing.

validate-xfdf-annotation-count-per-page.title: Validate Imported XFDF Annotation Count per PDF Page
validate-xfdf-annotation-count-per-page.description: Loads a PDF, imports annotations from an XFDF file, checks that each page contains the expected number of annotations, and saves the updated document.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Export and Re-import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file, clear the original annotations, re-import them, and verify that the annotation count remains unchanged.

list-pdf-annotation-ids-to-csv.title: List PDF Annotation IDs and Export to CSV
list-pdf-annotation-ids-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's annotations, extracts their identifier (Name or FullName), and writes the page number and annotation ID to a CSV file.

filter-pdf-annotations-by-author.title: Filter PDF Annotations by Author Name
filter-pdf-annotations-by-author.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's annotations, and removes any markup annotation whose author (Title) does not match the specified current user before saving the filtered document.

add-strikethrough-annotation-with-author.title: Add Strikethrough Annotation with Author to PDF
add-strikethrough-annotation-with-author.description: Shows how to create a StrikeOutAnnotation on a PDF page, define its rectangle, set the author (Title) and color, and save the updated document.

generate-annotation-summary-per-pdf-page.title: Generate Annotation Summary per PDF Page
generate-annotation-summary-per-pdf-page.description: Loads a PDF, counts each annotation type on every page, and writes a pretty‑printed JSON file that maps page numbers to annotation type counts.

add-polyline-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Polyline Annotation to PDF
add-polyline-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF, create a polyline annotation with custom vertices and appearance, add it to a page, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-arrow-line-ending-on-pdf-annotation.title: Set Arrow Line Ending on PDF Annotation
set-arrow-line-ending-on-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a line annotation to a PDF page and set its ending style to a closed arrow using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-from-fdf__v2.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf__v2.description: Shows how to read annotation definitions from an FDF file and add them to the matching pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

recolor-highlight-annotations-light-gree.title: Recolor Highlight Annotations to Light Green
recolor-highlight-annotations-light-gree.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, changes the color of every highlight annotation to light green, and saves the updated document.

get-annotation-bounding-rectangle.title: Get Annotation Bounding Rectangle and Dimensions
get-annotation-bounding-rectangle.description: Loads a PDF, accesses the first annotation on the first page, retrieves its bounding rectangle (considering page rotation), and logs the rectangle coordinates along with calculated width and height.

add-highlight-annotation-70-opacity.title: Add Highlight Annotation with 70% Opacity to PDF
add-highlight-annotation-70-opacity.description: Shows how to place a highlight annotation on a PDF page and set its opacity to 70% using Aspose.Pdf.

add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Popup Annotation Linked to a Sticky Note
add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextAnnotation (sticky note) and associate a PopupAnnotation with it so that detailed notes appear when the parent annotation is selected.

import-xfdf-annotations-reassign-pages.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Reassign to Different Pages
import-xfdf-annotations-reassign-pages.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then move those annotations to other pages based on a custom mapping dictionary.

remove-popup-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Popup Annotations from PDF
remove-popup-annotations-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, collects all PopupAnnotation objects, deletes them while keeping their parent markup annotations, and saves the cleaned document.

group-pdf-annotations-by-type.title: Group PDF Annotations by Type
group-pdf-annotations-by-type.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all annotations from each page, groups them by their AnnotationType enum, and prints the number of instances per type.

add-figure-annotation-external-image.title: Add Figure Annotation Referencing an External Image
add-figure-annotation-external-image.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external image file to a PDF page as a figure (file attachment) annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import them into another PDF, preserving comments and markup.

batch-add-text-annotation-to-first-page.title: Batch Add Text Annotation to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-text-annotation-to-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, add a standard text annotation to the first page of each document, and save the annotated copies to an output directory.

change-figure-annotation-color.title: Change Figure Annotation Color in PDF
change-figure-annotation-color.description: Loads a PDF, locates figure annotations (square, circle, etc.), accesses their appearance dictionary, changes the annotation color to red, and saves the modified document.

delete-annotations-from-pdf-using-csv.title: Delete PDF Annotations Using Names from CSV
delete-annotations-from-pdf-using-csv.description: The example reads annotation names from a CSV file, locates matching annotations in a PDF, removes them, and saves the updated document.

set-square-annotation-border-width.title: Set Square Annotation Border Width to 2 Points
set-square-annotation-border-width.description: Demonstrates adding a square annotation to a PDF page and configuring its border thickness to 2 points for clearer visualization.

extract-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Extract Popup Annotation Content to a New PDF
extract-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: The example locates the first PopupAnnotation in a PDF, retrieves its text content, and saves that content (with optional visual bounds) into a separate PDF document.

add-free-text-annotation-with-callout.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Callout to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-with-callout.description: Demonstrates how to add a free‑text annotation that includes a callout line to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-azure-blo.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Upload to Azure Blob Storage
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-azure-blo.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its annotations as an XFDF stream, and uploads the resulting XFDF file to an Azure Blob Storage container.

add-figure-annotation-around-table.title: Add Figure Annotation Around a Table in PDF
add-figure-annotation-around-table.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF document and surround it with a figure (square) annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-annotation-ids-page-numbers.title: Retrieve Annotation IDs and Page Numbers from PDF
retrieve-annotation-ids-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through its pages and annotations, extracting each annotation's identifier, and creating a dictionary that maps the ID to its page number.

delete-all-highlight-annotations.title: Delete All Highlight Annotations from PDF
delete-all-highlight-annotations.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, enumerating highlight annotations on each page, and removing them using Aspose.Pdf.

export-popup-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export Popup Annotations to XFDF
export-popup-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to extract only popup annotations from a PDF document and export them to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-from-fdf__v3.title: Import Annotations from FDF and Assign to PDF Pages
import-annotations-from-fdf__v3.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from an FDF file into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, automatically placing them on the correct pages, and then saving the updated PDF.

add-transparent-freetext-annotation.title: Add Transparent Free‑Text Annotation to PDF
add-transparent-freetext-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a free‑text annotation with a transparent background and semi‑transparent opacity to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-line-ending-styles-for-pdf-line-anno.title: Set Line Ending Styles for a PDF Line Annotation
set-line-ending-styles-for-pdf-line-anno.description: Demonstrates how to create a line annotation in a PDF and set its start and end line ending styles (circle and open arrow) using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-highlight-annotation-color.title: Change Highlight Annotation Color and Regenerate Appearance
replace-highlight-annotation-color.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages to find highlight annotations, changes their color to a custom shade, forces the appearance stream to be regenerated, and saves the modified document.

batch-add-popup-annotations.title: Batch Add Popup Annotations Linked to Text Annotations
batch-add-popup-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF, create a text (sticky note) annotation and a linked popup annotation, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-annotations-visibility-by-ro.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Set Visibility by User Role
import-xfdf-annotations-visibility-by-ro.description: Loads a PDF, imports annotations from an XFDF file, and adjusts each annotation's Hidden flag according to the supplied user role.

add-polyline-annotation-to-pdf__v2.title: Add Polyline Annotation to PDF
add-polyline-annotation-to-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to create a polyline annotation from a list of points, calculate its bounding rectangle, and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-magenta-underline-annotation.title: Add Magenta Underline Annotation with Custom Thickness
add-magenta-underline-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to place an underline annotation on a PDF page, set its color to magenta, and configure a 2‑point border thickness using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-3d-annotation-preview-images-to-.title: Extract 3D Annotation Preview Images to PDF Report
extract-3d-annotation-preview-images-to-.description: Opens a source PDF, extracts preview images from PDF3D annotations, and embeds them into a new PDF report, arranging the images on pages.

set-callout-leader-line-length.title: Set Callout Leader Line Length for Free‑Text Annotation
set-callout-leader-line-length.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a free‑text annotation with a custom appearance, defining callout points so the leader line is 20 points long, and saving the updated document.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-and-uploa.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Upload via REST API
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-and-uploa.description: The example loads a PDF document, extracts its annotations to an XFDF stream using Aspose.Pdf, and posts the XFDF file to a REST endpoint with an HTTP POST request.

import-consolidate-annotations-from-fdf.title: Import and Consolidate Annotations from Multiple FDF Files
import-consolidate-annotations-from-fdf.description: Shows how to import annotations from several FDF files into a PDF document and gather all page annotations into a single collection for further processing.

add-popup-annotation-with-custom-dimensi.title: Add Popup Annotation with Custom Dimensions Linked to Parent
add-popup-annotation-with-custom-dimensi.description: Demonstrates creating a parent TextAnnotation and attaching a PopupAnnotation with custom size and position, linking them together, and saving the updated PDF.

set-figure-annotation-border-color-dark-.title: Set Figure Annotation Border Color to Dark Gray
set-figure-annotation-border-color-dark-.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages and annotations, identify figure annotations, and change their border color to dark gray using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotation-ids-to-csv.title: Export PDF Annotation IDs and Authors to CSV
export-pdf-annotation-ids-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, extracts each annotation's identifier and author, and writes the data to a CSV file for auditing purposes.

add-highlight-annotation-with-opacity.title: Add Highlight Annotation with Custom Opacity to PDF
add-highlight-annotation-with-opacity.description: Shows how to create a highlight annotation with a custom opacity and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-annotations-restore-from-xfdf.title: Delete All Annotations and Restore from XFDF
delete-annotations-restore-from-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove every annotation from a PDF document and then re‑import them from an XFDF backup file using Aspose.Pdf.

set-highlight-annotation-opacity.title: Set Highlight Annotation Opacity to 60%
set-highlight-annotation-opacity.description: Shows how to iterate through all pages of a PDF, locate HighlightAnnotation objects, and set their opacity to 60% using Aspose.Pdf before saving the document.

add-screen-annotation-with-video.title: Add Screen Annotation with Video to PDF Page
add-screen-annotation-with-video.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a ScreenAnnotation that references a video file, and placing it on the third page of the document.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Sound Annotation (MP3) to PDF
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a SoundAnnotation that plays an MP3 file when the annotation area is clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-flash-rich-media-annotation.title: Add Flash Rich Media Annotation to PDF
add-flash-rich-media-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed a Flash (SWF) video in a PDF using a RichMediaAnnotation, configure a custom player, poster image, and activation settings.

add-3d-u3d-annotation-initial-view-page-.title: Add 3D U3D Annotation with Initial View on Page 2
add-3d-u3d-annotation-initial-view-page-.description: Demonstrates how to embed a U3D model as a 3D annotation on the second page of a PDF and set a custom initial view using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-first-richmediaannotation-from-.title: Retrieve First RichMediaAnnotation from Page Five
retrieve-first-richmediaannotation-from-.description: Loads a PDF, accesses page 5, uses a LINQ query to get the first RichMediaAnnotation on that page, and prints its main properties.

remove-sound-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Sound Annotations from a PDF
remove-sound-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through each page, find SoundAnnotation objects, delete them, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-button-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Button Annotation to PDF Page
add-javascript-button-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a button field to the fourth page of a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that shows an alert when the button is clicked.

add-goto-page-button-annotation.title: Add Go-To Page Button Annotation
add-goto-page-button-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a push‑button annotation that, when clicked, navigates to page 10 of the same PDF document.

insert-watermark-annotation-page-6.title: Insert Watermark Annotation on Page 6
insert-watermark-annotation-page-6.description: Demonstrates how to add a WatermarkAnnotation with 30% opacity centered on the sixth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-watermark-annotation.title: Add Text Watermark Annotation to PDF Pages
add-text-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a bold "Confidential" text watermark as an annotation to the top of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

reuse-ximage-across-multiple-pdf-pages.title: Reuse XImage Across Multiple PDF Pages
reuse-ximage-across-multiple-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load an image once, add it to the PDF resources, and reuse the same XImage object on every page to avoid duplicate image data.

add-background-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Image to PDF Page
add-background-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to create a BackgroundArtifact from an image file and attach it to a specific PDF page so the image appears behind the page content.

add-bates-numbering-with-prefix.title: Add Bates Numbering with Prefix to PDF
add-bates-numbering-with-prefix.description: Demonstrates how to apply Bates numbering to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with a custom "ABC" prefix and a six‑digit format.

count-watermark-artifacts-on-pdf-page.title: Count Watermark Artifacts on a PDF Page
count-watermark-artifacts-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over a page's Artifacts collection, filter for WatermarkArtifact objects, and count them.

set-watermark-artifact-opacity.title: Set Watermark Artifact Opacity to 50% in PDF
set-watermark-artifact-opacity.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page to find WatermarkArtifact objects, changes their opacity to 50%, and saves the modified document.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v3.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v3.description: Shows how to export annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import those annotations into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

import-fdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import FDF Annotations into PDF
import-fdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to read an FDF file containing form field annotations and merge them into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-screen-annotations-with-videos.title: Batch Add Screen Annotations with Videos to PDF Pages
batch-add-screen-annotations-with-videos.description: Demonstrates how to attach a different video file to each page of a multi‑page PDF by creating ScreenAnnotation objects and saving the updated document.

remove-background-artifacts-from-pdf-pag.title: Remove Background Artifacts from PDF Pages
remove-background-artifacts-from-pdf-pag.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over each page, locate BackgroundArtifact objects, delete them, and save the resulting document.

add-external-link-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add External Link Annotation to PDF
add-external-link-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a link annotation that opens an external URL when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-internal-link-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Internal Link Annotation to PDF
add-internal-link-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a link annotation on a PDF page that jumps to a specific page within the same document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-to-each-pdf-page.title: Add Sound Annotation to Each PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-to-each-pdf-page.description: Shows how to loop through all pages of a PDF and attach a SoundAnnotation that plays a notification tone when the page loads.

add-auto-play-rich-media-annotation.title: Add Auto‑Play Rich Media Annotation to PDF
add-auto-play-rich-media-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed a video or audio file into a PDF as a RichMediaAnnotation and configure it to start playing automatically when the page becomes visible.

clone-watermark-annotation-across-pdf-pa.title: Clone Watermark Annotation Across PDF Pages
clone-watermark-annotation-across-pdf-pa.description: Shows how to clone a WatermarkAnnotation, adjust its position, and apply it to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Stream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, exporting all its annotations directly to an in‑memory XFDF stream, and reading the XFDF content without writing the full document to disk.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, import annotations from an XFDF file while preserving the original page layout, and save the updated document.

add-rich-media-video-annotation.title: Add Rich Media Video Annotation to PDF (Streamed, Read‑Only)
add-rich-media-video-annotation.description: Demonstrates embedding an online video stream into a PDF as a RichMediaAnnotation and setting it read‑only to disable downloading.

create-3d-annotation-with-custom-lightin.title: Create 3D Annotation with Custom Lighting in PDF
create-3d-annotation-with-custom-lightin.description: Shows how to embed a U3D/PRC 3‑D model into a PDF and apply a custom lighting scheme and render mode using Aspose.Pdf.

iterate-pdf-annotations-log-media.title: Iterate PDF Annotations and Log Media Files
iterate-pdf-annotations-log-media.description: Loads a PDF, walks through each page's annotations, and prints the annotation type, rectangle coordinates, and any associated embedded media file name.

replace-background-artifact-image.title: Replace Background Artifact Image with High‑Resolution Version
replace-background-artifact-image.description: Loads a PDF, finds BackgroundArtifact objects on each page, and replaces their image with a higher‑resolution file while preserving the layout.

add-dynamic-date-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Dynamic Date Watermark to PDF Pages
add-dynamic-date-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a WatermarkAnnotation with a runtime‑generated date string to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-link-annotation-open-embedded-pdf.title: Create Link Annotation to Open Embedded PDF
create-link-annotation-open-embedded-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a PDF file into a document and add a link annotation that opens the embedded attachment when clicked.

set-dashed-border-for-button-annotations.title: Set Dashed Border for Button Annotations in PDF
set-dashed-border-for-button-annotations.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages and annotations, and changes the border of every button field to a dashed style with a thickness of two points.

extract-watermark-artifacts-report.title: Extract Watermark Artifacts and Generate CSV Report
extract-watermark-artifacts-report.description: The example opens a PDF, iterates through each page to find WatermarkArtifact objects, and writes their page number, position and opacity to a CSV file.

create-submit-button-with-javascript.title: Create Submit Button with JavaScript Action in PDF
create-submit-button-with-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to add a push button to a PDF that uses JavaScript to submit the form data to a specified HTTP endpoint.

add-rich-media-annotation-hidden-toolbar.title: Add Rich Media Annotation with Hidden Toolbar to PDF
add-rich-media-annotation-hidden-toolbar.description: Shows how to embed a video as a RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and hide the default playback toolbar for a clean viewer experience.

batch-add-image-watermark-artifact.title: Batch Add Image Watermark Artifact to PDFs
batch-add-image-watermark-artifact.description: Demonstrates how to process a collection of PDF files and add the same image‑based WatermarkArtifact to every page, using a shared image reference to keep the output file size low.

remove-screen-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Screen Annotations from PDF
remove-screen-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's annotations, delete any ScreenAnnotation objects, and save the cleaned document.

create-link-annotation-named-destination.title: Create Link Annotation to a Named Destination
create-link-annotation-named-destination.description: Demonstrates how to define a named destination on a PDF page and add a link annotation on another page that jumps to that destination using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-with-notification-t.title: Add Sound Annotation with Notification Tone to PDF
add-sound-annotation-with-notification-t.description: Demonstrates how to embed a SoundAnnotation that plays a WAV notification tone and is visible only when the annotation appears on screen.

duplicate-watermark-annotations-across-p.title: Duplicate Watermark Annotations Across PDF Pages
duplicate-watermark-annotations-across-p.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all WatermarkAnnotation objects from the first page, and programmatically copies them to every subsequent page while preserving visual and metadata properties.

create-3d-annotation-with-embedded-textu.title: Create 3D Annotation with Embedded Textures and Realistic Rendering
create-3d-annotation-with-embedded-textu.description: Demonstrates how to embed a U3D/PRC model with its textures into a PDF as a 3‑D annotation and adjust material rendering for realistic shading.

toggle-watermark-visibility-button.title: Toggle Watermark Visibility with Button Annotation
toggle-watermark-visibility-button.description: Demonstrates adding a WatermarkArtifact to a PDF page and a push‑button annotation that runs JavaScript to toggle the watermark’s opacity.

export-annotations-modify-colors-xfdf.title: Export Annotations to XFDF, Modify Colors, and Re‑import into PDF
export-annotations-modify-colors-xfdf.description: Demonstrates exporting PDF annotations to an XFDF file, editing the XFDF XML to change annotation colors, and importing the modified XFDF back into the PDF.

add-footer-watermark-annotation.title: Add Footer Watermark Annotation to PDF Pages
add-footer-watermark-annotation.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and adds a WatermarkAnnotation in the footer area with a unique page identifier, then saves the result.

embed-pdf-portfolio-richmedia-disable-pr.title: Embed PDF Portfolio as Rich Media and Disable Printing
embed-pdf-portfolio-richmedia-disable-pr.description: Shows how to add a RichMediaAnnotation that embeds a PDF portfolio into a PDF document and then encrypts the file to prevent printing.

add-screen-annotation-external-video.title: Add Screen Annotation with External Video URL
add-screen-annotation-external-video.description: Demonstrates how to place a ScreenAnnotation on a PDF page that opens an external video URL when activated.

increase-sound-annotation-clickable-area.title: Increase Clickable Area of Sound Annotations by 20%
increase-sound-annotation-clickable-area.description: Loads a PDF, finds all SoundAnnotation objects, expands each annotation's rectangle by 20% area while keeping its center, and saves the updated document.

apply-tiled-pdf-pattern-watermark.title: Apply Tiled PDF Pattern as Watermark Across All Pages
apply-tiled-pdf-pattern-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to use a WatermarkArtifact with a PDF page as a reusable XForm to tile a pattern across every page of a document, placing it behind the page content.

add-javascript-link-annotation-open-url.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to Open URL
add-javascript-link-annotation-open-url.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a link annotation with a JavaScript action that opens a specified URL in a new browser window, adds it to the first page, and saves the modified document.

replace-watermark-with-logo.title: Replace PDF Watermark Annotations with Corporate Logo
replace-watermark-with-logo.description: Demonstrates how to locate existing WatermarkAnnotation objects in a PDF, preserve their opacity and position, and replace them with a new image‑based StampAnnotation (corporate logo).

add-3d-annotation-custom-camera-view.title: Add 3D Annotation with Custom Camera View
add-3d-annotation-custom-camera-view.description: Shows how to embed a U3D model in a PDF and define a custom camera angle using a 3‑D annotation with Aspose.Pdf.

fade-background-artifacts.title: Fade Background Artifacts in PDF
fade-background-artifacts.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF pages and set the opacity of all BackgroundArtifacts to 40% to create a faded effect.

embed-mp4-video-with-poster.title: Embed MP4 Video with Poster Image using RichMediaAnnotation
embed-mp4-video-with-poster.description: Demonstrates adding a RichMediaAnnotation to a PDF that embeds an MP4 video and defines a poster image shown before playback.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Sound Annotation to PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to embed a SoundAnnotation that plays a WAV narration when the user clicks a defined region on page five of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-qr-code-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add QR Code Watermark to PDF
add-qr-code-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF and place a QR code image as a watermark artifact in the top‑right corner using Aspose.Pdf.

create-button-toggle-annotations-visibil.title: Create Button to Toggle Annotations Visibility
create-button-toggle-annotations-visibil.description: Shows how to add a push‑button to a PDF page that executes JavaScript to hide or show all annotations on the current page.

batch-add-sound-annotations-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Sound Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-sound-annotations-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and add a SoundAnnotation with a different audio file to each page before saving the document.

add-rich-media-pdf-annotation-read-only.title: Add Rich Media PDF Annotation (Read‑Only)
add-rich-media-pdf-annotation-read-only.description: Shows how to embed a PDF as a rich‑media annotation in another PDF and disable all interactive features for a read‑only view using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: Export PDF Annotations to CSV
export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, and writes each annotation's details to a CSV file for auditing.

add-button-annotation-highlight-text-fie.title: Create Button Annotation to Highlight Text Fields
add-button-annotation-highlight-text-fie.description: Shows how to add a push‑button annotation to a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf and attach a JavaScript action that highlights all text fields on the current page.

add-tiled-pdf-background-artifact.title: Add Tiled PDF Background Using BackgroundArtifact
add-tiled-pdf-background-artifact.description: Demonstrates how to use a high‑resolution PDF page as a tiled background for a new document by creating a BackgroundArtifact and adding it to a page's artifacts collection.

set-red-border-for-link-annotations.title: Set Red Border and Width for PDF Link Annotations
set-red-border-for-link-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to change the border color to red and increase the line width to three points for all link annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-repeating-text-watermark-artifact.title: Add Repeating Text Watermark Artifact to PDF Pages
add-repeating-text-watermark-artifact.description: Demonstrates how to create a semi‑transparent repeating text watermark across all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's WatermarkArtifact.

add-screen-annotation-external-swf.title: Add Screen Annotation with External SWF (Read‑Only)
add-screen-annotation-external-swf.description: Demonstrates how to add a ScreenAnnotation that references an external SWF file and set it to read‑only to prevent user editing.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations-merge-pdfs.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations and Merge PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations-merge-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to import XFDF annotation files into their matching PDFs and then merge all PDFs into a single document while preserving the imported annotations.

add-rich-media-video-annotation__v2.title: Add Rich Media Video Annotation with Double‑Click Activation
add-rich-media-video-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates how to embed a video into a PDF as a RichMediaAnnotation, configure it to start playback on a double‑click (using the Click activation event), and optionally set a poster image.

replace-background-artifacts-with-new-im.title: Replace Background Artifacts in PDF Pages
replace-background-artifacts-with-new-im.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's artifacts, identifies BackgroundArtifact objects, and replaces their image with a new PNG while preserving positions and settings.

add-javascript-link-annotation-modal-dia.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to Show Modal Dialog
add-javascript-link-annotation-modal-dia.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation with a JavaScript action that displays a custom modal dialog in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-watermark-dynamic-opacity.title: Batch Add Watermark Artifact with Dynamic Opacity to PDFs
batch-watermark-dynamic-opacity.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, computes an opacity value based on each document's page count, and adds a centered "CONFIDENTIAL" watermark artifact to every page.

create-3d-annotation-metal-surface.title: Create 3D Annotation with Metal Surface Lighting
create-3d-annotation-metal-surface.description: Shows how to embed a U3D model in a PDF as a 3‑D annotation and configure lighting, render mode, and background color to simulate realistic metal surfaces.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page__v2.title: Add Sound Annotation (Chime) to a PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page__v2.description: Demonstrates how to attach a SoundAnnotation that plays a chime when a specific page becomes visible in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

clone-richmedia-annotations-to-summary-p.title: Clone RichMedia Annotations to Summary Page
clone-richmedia-annotations-to-summary-p.description: Loads a PDF, creates a new summary page, and clones every RichMediaAnnotation from the existing pages onto that page while preserving key properties.

add-export-annotations-button.title: Add Button to Export Annotations as JSON
add-export-annotations-button.description: Demonstrates how to create a push‑button field in a PDF that runs JavaScript to collect all annotations on the page and display them as a JSON string. The example uses Aspose.Pdf to add the button and assign a JavascriptAction.

add-watermark-annotation-with-gradient.title: Add Watermark Annotation with Gradient Fill to PDF
add-watermark-annotation-with-gradient.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a WatermarkAnnotation covering most of a page, setting its color and opacity, and adding it to the page before saving. The example highlights where a custom appearance stream could be used for gradient fill and diagonal rotation.

extract-embedded-media-from-richmedia-an.title: Extract Embedded Media from RichMedia Annotations
extract-embedded-media-from-richmedia-an.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, locate RichMediaAnnotation objects, and save their embedded media streams to a structured folder hierarchy.

create-link-annotation-external-pdf-page.title: Create Link Annotation to Open External PDF Page
create-link-annotation-external-pdf-page.description: Shows how to add a link annotation to a PDF that opens a specific page of another PDF document when clicked.

add-animated-gif-screen-annotation.title: Add Animated GIF as Screen Annotation on PDF Page
add-animated-gif-screen-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed an animated GIF as a ScreenAnnotation on the third page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with the animation looping continuously.

align-watermark-annotations-to-page-marg.title: Align Watermark Annotations to Page Margins
align-watermark-annotations-to-page-marg.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, find WatermarkAnnotation objects, and reposition them uniformly within a specified margin from each page edge.

toggle-rich-media-visibility-button.title: Toggle Rich Media Visibility with a Button
toggle-rich-media-visibility-button.description: Shows how to add a RichMediaAnnotation and a push button that toggles its visibility using a HideAction in Aspose.Pdf.

add-3d-annotation-front-view.title: Add 3D Annotation with Front View to PDF
add-3d-annotation-front-view.description: Shows how to embed a 3‑D model (U3D/PRC) into a PDF, create a front‑view camera, and add a 3‑D annotation that activates when the page opens.

batch-replace-watermark-annotations.title: Batch Replace Watermark Annotations with Current Date
batch-replace-watermark-annotations.description: Shows how to open a PDF, iterate through all pages and annotations, locate WatermarkAnnotation objects, and replace their text with a new string that includes the current date while applying a custom text style.

add-js-link-word-count.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to Show Word Count
add-js-link-word-count.description: Shows how to create a link annotation with a JavaScript action that displays the PDF's total word count in an alert dialog.

add-background-music-to-pdf.title: Add Background Music to PDF Using RichMediaAnnotation
add-background-music-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates embedding an MP3 file as a RichMediaAnnotation that automatically plays when the page becomes visible, and saving the modified PDF.

create-pdf-with-gradient-background.title: Create PDF with Gradient Background Using BackgroundArtifact
create-pdf-with-gradient-background.description: Shows how to generate a blue‑to‑white gradient bitmap in memory and apply it as a page background using Aspose.Pdf's BackgroundArtifact.

add-dynamic-page-number-watermark.title: Add Dynamic Page Number Watermark with WatermarkAnnotation
add-dynamic-page-number-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to place a WatermarkAnnotation on each PDF page that automatically shows the current page number using the "#" placeholder.

embed-pdf-portfolio-richmedia-annotation.title: Embed PDF Portfolio with RichMediaAnnotation
embed-pdf-portfolio-richmedia-annotation.description: Shows how to embed a PDF portfolio into a PDF using a RichMediaAnnotation and set the initial view to the first embedded file.

change-button-annotation-color-to-blue.title: Change Button Annotation Color to Blue
change-button-annotation-color-to-blue.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating over its annotations, identifying button fields, setting their color to blue, and saving the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-video-screen-annotations.title: Batch Add Video Screen Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-video-screen-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to add a ScreenAnnotation containing a video file to every page of a PDF, automatically calculating the rectangle to keep a 16:9 aspect ratio.
